channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Hungarian Election Sees Orban Concede Defeat
item.description: In a surprising turn of events, Hungarian Prime Minister Viktor Orbán conceded defeat in Sunday's general election (Monday AEST), marking a significant shift in the nation's political landscape and po...

item.title: Police Operation in Islamabad Leads to Injuries and Arrests Among Afghan Residents
item.description: In Islamabad, a police operation targeting Afghan residents in the Sarai Kharboza area escalated into a violent clash, leaving four police officials injured. According to the FIR filed at Golra Police...

item.title: Resolution Foundation report shows large families on benefits gain from inflation-linked rises while middle-class households face costs
item.description: A new report from the Resolution Foundation think-tank has analysed the effects of recent inflation-busting increases to benefits introduced by Chancellor Rachel Reeves. According to the findings, lar...

item.title: Tanzanian boy gets scholarship from US-based benefactor after dropping out to care for ill mother
item.description: A Tanzanian boy who dropped out of school after finishing Grade Seven has received help from a US-based Tanzanian named Claude Maheshe. The young boy left school because he had no money for school fee...

item.title: Where South Africans Are Going Abroad for Medical and Wellness Treatments in 2026
item.description: Medical tourism has become increasingly relevant for South Africans seeking cost-effective and high-quality healthcare abroad. The rising costs of private care and lengthy public hospital wait times m...

item.title: Iran, US Talks in Islamabad End Without Agreement as Ghalibaf Rejects Pressure
item.description: Iran’s Parliament Speaker Mohammad Bagher Ghalibaf has declared that Tehran will not yield to any threats following US President Donald Trump’s order to impose a naval blockade on the Strait of Hormuz...

item.title: Andrew Mountbatten-Windsor reportedly insulted ex-wife Sarah Ferguson in front of media executive
item.description: Andrew Mountbatten-Windsor, the former prince, is under renewed scrutiny following claims that he insulted his ex-wife, Sarah Ferguson, in front of a prominent media executive. Married in 1986 and div...

item.title: Israeli National Security Minister Itamar Ben-Gvir enters Al Aqsa Mosque compound under heavy security
item.description: Israeli far-right National Security Minister Itamar Ben-Gvir entered the Al Aqsa Mosque compound in occupied East Jerusalem on Sunday under heavy police protection. The incursion took place amid ongoi...

item.title: Long-term cancer survivors diagnosed as adolescents or young adults face higher risk of new tumours
item.description: A recent study from Alberta, published in the Canadian Medical Association Journal, has found that individuals treated for cancer during adolescence or young adulthood are twice as likely as their pee...

item.title: JM dela Cerna and Marielle Montellano prepare post-'YFSF' concert for fans
item.description: After emerging as victors in 'Your Face Sounds Familiar' (YFSF), JM dela Cerna and Marielle Montellano are now preparing for their first major concert together. The two artists, recognized for their v...

item.title: Trump Orders US Naval Blockade of Strait of Hormuz After US-Iran Ceasefire Talks Fail in Islamabad
item.description: US President Donald Trump has directed the US Navy to start an immediate blockade of the Strait of Hormuz after high-level ceasefire talks between the United States and Iran in Islamabad, Pakistan, en...

item.title: Philippines Reports Initial Findings of Cyanide Use by Chinese Maritime Militia Near BRP Sierra Madre in Ayungin Shoal
item.description: On April 13, 2026, the Philippine National Security Council, together with the Philippine Navy and the National Bureau of Investigation, held a press conference to announce the initial findings of an ...

item.title: Government audit to reassess carers’ allowance overpayments amid ongoing repayment demands
item.description: The UK government has launched a major review into more than 200,000 historical carer’s allowance cases after years of administrative failings that left thousands of unpaid carers facing unlawful debt...

item.title: NDJ Temporarily Removes Burna Boy Music from DJ Playlists After Alleged Assault on DJ Tunez
item.description: The Nigerian DJ Association (NDJ) don declare say dem don ban all Burna Boy music from their members playlists. This one happen after the singer and him team allegedly beat up popular DJ Tunez at Obi’...

item.title: Asha Bhosle: The Legendary Singer Who Mastered Musical Crossover Across Eras
item.description: Asha Bhosle, the iconic Indian playback singer who passed away recently at the age of 92, was a true pioneer in blending musical styles long before the term 'crossover' gained popularity in the indust...

item.title: Compliance requirement for large companies as e-invoicing rollout approaches
item.description: As the June deadline for Nigeria's new e-invoicing system approaches, many big companies dey face risk of sanctions if dem no hook their invoicing systems to the National Revenue Service (NRS) platfor...

item.title: London Police Arrest Hundreds at Pro-Palestinian Demonstration Over Support for Banned Group
item.description: In London on Saturday, police arrested over 500 demonstrators supporting Palestine Action, a group banned in the UK. The sit-down protest in Trafalgar Square saw activists of various ages, from 18 to ...

item.title: NAF Airstrike on Jilli Market near Borno-Yobe Border Kills Dozens, Civilian Casualties Alleged
item.description: Na so so tragedy happen yesterday for di weekly market wey dem dey call Jilli, wey dey along Borno and Yobe border. Di Nigerian Air Force carry out airstrike as part of Operation Hadin Kai to target s...

item.title: Experience Niagara Falls from the Air on Ontario’s First Flying Theatre Ride
item.description: Niagara Parks has introduced Ontario’s first flying theatre ride, Niagara Takes Flight, located inside the Table Rock Centre near Niagara Falls. The immersive experience combines cinematic footage fil...

item.title: US CPI surges in March due to energy price spike from Iran conflict, signalling potential inflation pressure for Australia
item.description: US Consumer Price Index data released for March 2026 shows a significant jump in inflation, largely driven by the largest monthly increase in petrol prices in six decades. This surge is directly linke...
